creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Curtis Hamilton from comment #4)

Hi Curtis,

Let me know when you get it working.  The changes to make it work shouldn't be too big.  Largely, you just have to remove all the hard-coded stuff and make the makefile take in things from the port makefile instead.

I have not conducted a build test yet as some of the issues will certainly prevent a build (e.g. the missing dependencies).  Will do so once the port looks like it should build.
